agents.prompt:
Read the following tkinter UI files and list ALL user-facing features/controls you find. For each feature, note: name, where it appears (file:line range), and a brief description of what it does. Be thorough — include settings panels, search controls, download controls, context menus, dialogs, etc.

Return a structured list of ALL features.
